title: Add Strategic Logging
description: Instrument code to capture exactly the evidence a bug requires.
content:
I'm chasing this intermittent bug: {{bug}}

Show me where to add logging to capture the evidence needed to diagnose it. For each log point:
- What to log (state, inputs, timing) and at what level.
- Why that data discriminates between hypotheses.
- How to keep it cheap enough to leave in production if useful.

Prefer a few high-signal logs over blanket tracing.
